extDescription.message: Sorts the Steam notes list by AppID and flags Early Access games on your wishlist — two toggleable modules in one extension.

moduleNotesDescription.message: On steamcommunity.com/notes/list: games with a resolvable AppID are moved above a separator line, everything else below it.

moduleWishlistLabel.message: Flag Early Access on the wishlist

moduleWishlistDescription.message: On your Steam wishlist, adds an "Early Access" label with a link to the news page for already-released Early Access games.
